heading: Today
text: Sunshine, mixing with clouds north and east of I-89. Highs in the 40s to low 50s north, in the 50s south.  Winds north near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Some evening clouds northeast, then mostly clear and chilly.  Lows in the 20s to low 30s, a few colder mountain valleys north near 20.  Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Sun, mixing with some clouds northeast.  Clouds increasing in the afternoon from the Hudson Valley and Berkshires, north to I-89 by late.  Highs in the 50s.  Winds light, becoming east less than 10 mph.
